description: Student Interaction Action Types - Add group and individual student interaction as 5th and 6th required action types for PM school visit completion. IMPORTANT: Before starting each story, read these three files for full context: (1) docs/ai/project-context.md (2) ralph/prd-student-interaction.md (3) docs/ai/student-interaction/2026-03-18-student-interaction-implementation-plan.md

userStories.title: Group Student Discussion config and validation library
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a configuration and validation module for Student Interaction so the API and form can validate question data consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/lib/group-student-discussion.ts` created with config, types, `VALID_GRADES`, and both validation functions
`GROUP_STUDENT_DISCUSSION_CONFIG` has exactly 1 section ('General Check') and 4 questions with keys: gc_interacted, gc_program_updates, gc_direction, gc_concerns
`ALLOWED_TOP_LEVEL_KEYS = new Set(["grade", "questions"])`

Lenient validation (`validateGroupStudentDiscussionSave`) accepts `{}`, partial questions, valid grade (11 or 12), null answers; rejects unknown top-level keys and invalid grade values (10, 13, "eleven", null, floats)
Strict validation (`validateGroupStudentDiscussionComplete`) requires grade (11 or 12) and all 4 non-null boolean answers
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Group Student Discussion unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need thorough unit tests for the group student discussion validation library to ensure correctness.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/lib/group-student-discussion.test.ts` created with ~25 tests following `src/lib/principal-interaction.test.ts` pattern
Config integrity tests: 1 section, 4 questions, unique keys, key format `gc_*`
Save validation tests: accepts `{}`, partial questions, valid grade, null answers, remarks; rejects unknown keys, invalid grade (10, 13, "eleven", null), non-boolean answer, non-string remark
Complete validation tests: rejects empty, missing grade, missing questions, incomplete (2/4), null answers; accepts fully complete payload
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Individual Student Discussion config and validation library
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a configuration and validation module for Individual Student Interaction so the API and form can validate per-student question data consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/lib/individual-student-discussion.ts` created following `src/lib/individual-af-teacher-interaction.ts` pattern (simplified: no attendance gating, add grade per student)
`INDIVIDUAL_STUDENT_DISCUSSION_CONFIG` has exactly 1 section ('Operational Health') and 2 questions with keys: oh_teaching_concern, oh_additional_support
`ALLOWED_TOP_LEVEL_KEYS = new Set(["students"])` — no attendance logic
Lenient validation (`validateIndividualStudentDiscussionSave`) accepts `{}`, partial student entries, null answers; rejects unknown top-level keys, duplicate student IDs

Strict validation (`validateIndividualStudentDiscussionComplete`) requires >= 1 student, each with valid id (positive int, unique), name (non-empty string), grade (11 or 12), and all 2 non-null boolean answers
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Individual Student Discussion unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need thorough unit tests for the individual student discussion validation library.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/lib/individual-student-discussion.test.ts` created with ~25 tests following `src/lib/individual-af-teacher-interaction.test.ts` pattern
Config integrity tests: 1 section, 2 questions, unique keys
Lenient/strict validation, duplicate IDs, grade validation (11/12 only), per-student question validation all covered
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Student utility helpers
userStories.description: As a developer, I need shared student display name utilities for use across form components.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/lib/student-utils.ts` created copying `src/lib/teacher-utils.ts` pattern with `Student` interface: `{ id: number; full_name: string | null; student_id: string | null; grade: number | null }`
`getStudentDisplayName(student)` returns `full_name?.trim()` -> fallback `student_id` -> fallback `Student #${id}`
`src/lib/student-utils.test.ts` created with 3 tests covering all fallback paths
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Students API endpoint
userStories.description: As a developer, I need an API endpoint to fetch students for a given school and optional grade, so the Individual Student Interaction form can populate its student dropdown.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/app/api/pm/students/route.ts` created with GET handler at `/api/pm/students?school_code=XXXXX&grade=11`
Auth via `requireVisitsAccess(session, 'view')` — returns 401 when not authenticated, 403 for passcode users
Returns 400 when `school_code` missing or `grade` is not a positive integer
Resolves `school_code` -> `school.id` + `region` via DB query, returns 404 when school not found
Checks scope access via `canAccessVisitSchoolScope()`, returns 403 when user lacks school access
Queries students via join chain: group_user -> group(type='school') -> user -> student -> enrollment_record(is_current) -> grade; filters by school.id, optional grade, excludes dropouts
Returns `{ students: StudentRow[] }` where StudentRow = `{ id, full_name, student_id, grade }`
Returns empty array when no matching students
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Students API unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for the students API endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/app/api/pm/students/route.test.ts` created with ~10 tests following `src/app/api/pm/teachers/route.test.ts` pattern
Covers auth (401/403), validation (400), access (403/404), success paths (with/without grade filter, empty results)
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Group Student Discussion form component
userStories.description: As a PM, I want a grade-scoped checklist form for recording group student interactions so I can document my discussions with students during school visits.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/components/visits/GroupStudentDiscussionForm.tsx` created following `src/components/visits/PrincipalInteractionForm.tsx` pattern
Props: `{ data, setData, disabled }` — no schoolCode needed
Grade dropdown (`<select>`) renders with options 11 and 12, reads/writes `data.grade`
Questions hidden before grade selection, visible after grade selected
Section title rendered as 'General Check Grade {N}' (dynamic with selected grade)
Yes/No radio buttons update `data.questions` via `setData`; remark toggle and text input work correctly
Sticky progress summary (`top-12 z-10`): 'Answered: X/4' — only shows after grade selected
Disabled mode: dropdown disabled, radios disabled, no 'Add remark' buttons
`data-testid="action-renderer-group_student_discussion"`
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
Build passes (`npm run build`)

userStories.title: Group Student Discussion form unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for the Group Student Discussion form component.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/components/visits/GroupStudentDiscussionForm.test.tsx` created with ~15 tests following `src/components/visits/PrincipalInteractionForm.test.tsx` pattern
Covers: grade dropdown rendering, questions visibility gating, section title with grade, answer/remark updates, progress bar counts, disabled mode
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Individual Student Discussion form component
userStories.description: As a PM, I want a per-student checklist form for recording individual student interactions so I can document my discussions with specific students during school visits.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/components/visits/IndividualStudentDiscussionForm.tsx` created following `src/components/visits/IndividualAFTeacherInteractionForm.tsx` pattern (remove attendance, add grade filter, use student API)
Props: `{ data, setData, disabled, schoolCode }`
Grade filter dropdown: when grade changes -> re-fetch students from `/api/pm/students?school_code=${schoolCode}&grade=${selectedGrade}`
Loading and error states displayed during/after fetch
Student select dropdown shows `getStudentDisplayName()` for remaining (not-yet-added) students; on select adds student with `{ id, name, grade: selectedGrade, questions: {} }`
Accordion: header shows name + grade badge + progress `X/2`; click toggles expand
Per-student 2 binary Yes/No questions + remarks (same rendering as teacher form but without attendance gating)
Remove button removes student from `data.students` array
Disabled mode: no grade filter, no add/remove, radios disabled
Sticky progress summary shows student count
`data-testid` prefixes: `student-section-{id}`, `student-header-{id}`, `remove-student-{id}`, `add-student-select`
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
Build passes (`npm run build`)

userStories.title: Individual Student Discussion form unit tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need unit tests for the Individual Student Discussion form component.
acceptanceCriteria: `src/components/visits/IndividualStudentDiscussionForm.test.tsx` created with ~18 tests following `src/components/visits/IndividualAFTeacherInteractionForm.test.tsx` pattern
Covers: grade filter, student fetch, loading/error states, add/remove students, accordion, per-student questions/remarks, progress bar, grade badge, disabled mode
Uses `vi.stubGlobal('fetch', ...)` for API mocking
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Wire into ActionDetailForm (form rendering, sanitize, bootstrap)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to integrate both student interaction forms into the existing ActionDetailForm dispatcher so they render for the correct action types with proper data sanitization.
acceptanceCriteria: Add imports for both form components and config modules to `src/components/visits/ActionDetailForm.tsx`
Add `GROUP_STUDENT_DISCUSSION_ACTION_TYPE` and `INDIVIDUAL_STUDENT_DISCUSSION_ACTION_TYPE` constants + add both to `SAVE_BEFORE_END_TYPES` set
Replace generic text-field configs (lines 103-144) in `ACTION_FORM_CONFIGS` with custom form configs (empty `fields`, title/description only)
`sanitizeGroupStudentDiscussionPayload()` strips unknown keys, normalizes grade + questions (copy principal interaction pattern + grade handling)
`sanitizeIndividualStudentDiscussionPayload()` strips unknown keys, normalizes students array with per-student grade + questions (copy individual teacher pattern, remove attendance)
Bootstrap functions return safe defaults for null/non-object data: `{ grade: null, questions: {} }` and `{ students: [] }`
`normalizeFormDataForAction` dispatches to correct bootstrap function for both types before generic fallback
`sanitizePatchData` dispatches to correct sanitize function for both types before generic fallback
Form renderer JSX: group form gets `data/setData/disabled`, individual form also gets `schoolCode`
Individual student end error message is specific and helpful
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
Build passes (`npm run build`)
Verify in browser using agent-browser

userStories.title: Wire into ActionPointList (card stats)
userStories.description: As a PM, I want to see summary stats on action cards for student interactions so I can quickly see progress without opening each action.
acceptanceCriteria: Import `GROUP_STUDENT_DISCUSSION_CONFIG` in `src/components/visits/ActionPointList.tsx`
`getGroupStudentDiscussionStats(data)` returns `{ grade, answeredCount, totalQuestions }` or null for empty/missing data
`getIndividualStudentDiscussionStats(data)` returns `{ studentCount }` or null for empty/missing data
Card rendering shows grade + answered progress (e.g. '2/4 (50%)') for group_student_discussion type
Card rendering shows student count (e.g. 'Students: 2') for individual_student_discussion type
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
Build passes (`npm run build`)

userStories.title: Enable in ActionTypePickerModal
userStories.description: As a PM, I want to see Student Interaction and Individual Student Interaction as selectable options when adding a new action to a visit.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `group_student_discussion` and `individual_student_discussion` to the `enabled` condition in `src/components/visits/ActionTypePickerModal.tsx` (line 47)
6 total enabled types, 4 disabled types in the picker modal
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)
Build passes (`npm run build`)

userStories.title: Update display labels in visit-actions

acceptanceCriteria: In `src/lib/visit-actions.ts`: change `group_student_discussion` label from 'Group Student Discussion' to 'Student Interaction'
In `src/lib/visit-actions.ts`: change `individual_student_discussion` label from 'Individual Student Discussion' to 'Individual Student Interaction'
Update label assertions in `src/lib/visit-actions.test.ts` for new labels

userStories.title: PATCH route validation for both student types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the PATCH action route to validate student interaction data using the correct validation functions based on action status.
acceptanceCriteria: Import validation functions from `@/lib/group-student-discussion` and `@/lib/individual-student-discussion` in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/route.ts`
Add validation blocks after existing principal_interaction block: `in_progress` actions use lenient validation (save), `completed` actions use strict validation
Returns 422 with descriptive errors when validation fails for either type
Existing action types still work correctly (no regression)
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: END route validation for both student types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the END action route to validate student interaction data using strict validation before allowing an action to be completed.
acceptanceCriteria: Import strict validation functions in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/end/route.ts`
Add `groupStudentDiscussionValidationError()` and `individualStudentDiscussionValidationError()` functions (copy `principalInteractionValidationError` pattern)
Invocations added in both main path and concurrent fallback path
END validates `group_student_discussion` strictly (all 4 questions + valid grade)
END validates `individual_student_discussion` strictly (>= 1 student, all questions answered)
No 'all students recorded' DB check (unlike teacher END)
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Visit completion requires 6 action types
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the visit completion route to require all 6 action types before allowing a visit to be marked as completed.
acceptanceCriteria: Add two new sequential checks in `src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/complete/route.ts` after principal_interaction check, before UPDATE query
Check 1: At least one completed `group_student_discussion` action exists — 422 if missing with error 'At least one completed Student Interaction is required to complete visit'
Check 2: At least one completed `individual_student_discussion` action exists — 422 if missing with error 'At least one completed Individual Student Interaction is required to complete visit'
Short-circuit order: classroom -> AF team -> individual teacher -> principal -> group student -> individual student
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: Unit tests for PATCH, END, and COMPLETE route changes
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to update existing route tests and add new tests covering validation of both student interaction types across PATCH, END, and COMPLETE routes.
acceptanceCriteria: PATCH route tests (`src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/route.test.ts`): +7 new tests for both student types (lenient accepts, strict rejects, valid complete)
END route tests (`src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/actions/[actionId]/end/route.test.ts`): +6 new tests for both types (incomplete rejected, complete succeeds, concurrent path)
COMPLETE route tests (`src/app/api/pm/visits/[id]/complete/route.test.ts`): +3 new tests (missing group_student rejects, missing individual_student rejects, all 6 types pass)
CRITICAL: Existing 'all pass' and short-circuit tests in complete route have mock chains extended with 2 extra `.mockResolvedValueOnce()` calls (7->9 total queries)
No regressions in existing tests
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

ActionPointList tests (`src/components/visits/ActionPointList.test.tsx`): +8 tests for stats functions (partial/complete/null data) and card rendering for both types
Unit tests pass (`npm run test`)

userStories.title: E2E test seed data and builder functions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to update E2E test helpers with seed data builders for both student interaction types so existing visit completion tests continue to pass with 6 required types.
acceptanceCriteria: `buildCompleteGroupStudentDiscussionData(grade?: number)` added to `e2e/helpers/db.ts` — returns `{ grade: 11, questions: { gc_interacted: { answer: true }, gc_program_updates: { answer: true }, gc_direction: { answer: true }, gc_concerns: { answer: true } } }`

`buildCompleteIndividualStudentDiscussionData()` added to `e2e/helpers/db.ts` — returns `{ students: [{ id: 1, name: 'Test Student', grade: 11, questions: { oh_teaching_concern: { answer: true }, oh_additional_support: { answer: false } } }] }`
Existing visit completion E2E tests in `e2e/tests/visits.spec.ts` updated to seed all 6 action types (was 4)
E2E tests pass (`npm run test:e2e`)

`fillIndividualStudentDiscussionForm(page)` helper added: select grade 11, select a student from dropdown, answer 2 questions, end action

userStories.title: Review changes and document findings
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to review all changes made during this feature implementation to ensure nothing was missed and document the results.
acceptanceCriteria: Use explore agents to understand the current state of modified files
Review git diff to see all changes made
Verify no unintended side effects or missing pieces
Run `npm run test` — all unit tests pass
Run `npm run build` — TypeScript compiles cleanly
Run `npm run lint` — no new lint errors
Create `ralph/student-interaction-review.txt` with concise findings (under 50 lines)
Review file summarizes: what was done, files changed, any concerns or recommendations
